calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-10-2011 Off Calendar

Default Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar May-19-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Ellen Chaitin, Clerk: J. Willis-McGhee,
CSR: B. Fields, CSR #7235

AKELE ATKINS, Esq. appeared for plaintiff(s) FERGUSON ENTERPRISES, INC.,

Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was in file.

Default has been entered against the Defendant(s).

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff(s), and against the Defaulted Defendant(s) ERIC MARTINEZ AKA ERIC BLAINE MARTINEZ for Judgment as follows:

Damages/Principal - $25,660.79
Prejudgment Interest - $9379.56
Attorney's Fees - $3035.00
Costs - $533.90
Total judgment in the amount of $38,609.25

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-29-2011 Continued To Jun-24-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-31-2011 Continued To May-13-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 610
